channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Australia's Historical Housing Crises and Government Interventions: Lessons for Today
item.description: The article explores Australia's recurring housing challenges throughout history, emphasizing the role of government intervention in addressing social and economic inequities. It highlights key moment...

item.title: CJP alleges police action during Parliament march, claims protesters were assaulted
item.description: The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP), a pressure group leading a protest at Delhi’s Jantar Mantar, has accused the Delhi Police of using excessive force during its march towards Parliament. The group claim...

item.title: Amateur Astronomer Discovers 390-Million-Year-Old Meteor Crater in Quebec
item.description: In 2024, amateur astronomer Joël Lapointe stumbled upon a suspicious pit while using Google Maps to plan a camping trip in Quebec's Côte-Nord region. Researchers later confirmed it as a previously uni...

item.title: India's Youth Movement Challenges Government Over Education and Unemployment
item.description: The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP), initially a satirical online joke, has evolved into a significant political movement in India. Founded by Abhijeet Dipke after a social media comment likened unemploye...

item.title: Tanzania's Anti-Corruption Efforts Face Challenges in High-Value Theft Case
item.description: A Tanzanian Deputy Principal Prosecutor is struggling with legal challenges in a corruption case involving the alleged misappropriation of 323 million shillings from government funds. The case highlig...

item.title: Froth & Fury Fest 2027 Unveils Stacked Lineup and New Initiatives for Emerging Artists
item.description: Adelaide’s Froth & Fury Festival is set to become one of Australia’s premier heavy music events in 2027, with its first lineup announcement showcasing a mix of international heavyweights and local fav...

item.title: Dandenong councillors to vote on $1 billion plan to redevelop historic market precinct
item.description: Greater Dandenong councillors are set to make a crucial decision on a proposed $1 billion transformation of the Dandenong Market precinct. The 159-year-old market, which has been described as isolated...

item.title: Akaky’s Struggle for Dignity in 'The Overcoat'
item.description: The article reviews Nikolai Gogol's short story 'The Overcoat,' focusing on the protagonist Akaky Akakyevich, a government clerk who lives in poverty and social neglect. Despite being mocked by collea...

item.title: Holly Hebe Releases Music Video for 'Swimsuit'
item.description: The article discusses the release of a music video by Australian singer Holly Hebe for her song 'Swimsuit.' Published on July 21, 2026, the video marks a significant milestone in Hebe's career, showca...

item.title: Dennis Ombachi Cooks Whole Ostrich, Sparks Social Media Reaction
item.description: Dennis Ombachi, known as the Roaming Chef, made headlines by catching a live ostrich and cooking it into pulled burgers for university students in Juja. The former rugby player chased down the bird, p...

item.title: President Tinubu Makes Key Appointments to Federal Agencies and Commissions
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has made several high-profile appointments across federal agencies and commissions, including appointing former Ekiti State Governor Ayo Fayose as Chairman of the Rural Electrifi...

item.title: US-Iran conflict escalates as Trump vows retaliation and oil prices rise
item.description: The article details the ongoing tensions between the United States and Iran, highlighting President Donald Trump's threats of severe retaliation against Iran for the deaths of American soldiers. Follo...

item.title: Toronto officials and community leaders discuss gang violence and gun prevention after St. Clair shooting
item.description: Toronto officials, community representatives, and other stakeholders gathered for a roundtable discussion focused on gangs, gun violence, and public safety following the deadly shooting at the Salsa o...

item.title: Former FM highlights importance of trilateral cooperation for regional prosperity
item.description: Former Foreign Minister Khurshid Mahmud Kasuri emphasized the necessity of peaceful cooperation between Pakistan, India, and China to unlock regional connectivity, stabilize trade routes, and combat p...

item.title: Legal Experts Weigh In On Nigeria’s Compensation Claim Against South Africa
item.description: Experts have clarified that Nigeria does not automatically have a legal right to seek compensation from South Africa for property losses by its citizens during anti-illegal immigration protests. The c...

item.title: Soldier Families Detail Inhumane Conditions In Coup Plot Trial
item.description: Families of Nigerian soldiers accused of plotting a coup against President Tinubu have revealed shocking details about their inhumane detention conditions. The relatives claim the officers are being f...

item.title: Padilla's counter-affidavit on obstruction of justice charges not yet submitted to Ombudsman
item.description: The article discusses the legal proceedings involving Robin Padilla, who faces obstruction of justice charges. It highlights that his counter-affidavit, which is part of his defense against the allega...

item.title: Nitrogen Bubbles in Titan's Methane Seas May Explain 'Magic Islands' Observed by Cassini
item.description: The article discusses the mysterious 'magic islands' observed by NASA's Cassini spacecraft in Titan's methane seas, which appeared, disappeared, and reappeared over time. Scientists propose that these...

item.title: Trainee IPS Officer Faces Sexual Harassment Allegations and Suicide Attempt
item.description: A 32-year-old trainee IPS officer, accused of sexually harassing a female colleague at the National Police Academy (NPA) in Hyderabad, allegedly attempted suicide after a criminal case was registered ...

item.title: Calgary City Council Proposes Doubling Funding for Werklund Centre Modernization Amid Rising Costs
item.description: The City of Calgary has requested to double its financial commitment to the modernization of the Werklund Centre, formerly known as Arts Commons, as project costs have surged to $345 million. This fin...
